Title of each class Name of each exchange on which registered Common Stock (Shares)* New York Stock Exchange Securities registered or to be registered pursuant to Section 12(g) of the Act. None (Title of Class) Securities for which there is a reporting obligation pursuant to Section 15(d) of the Act. None (Title of Class) Indicate the number of outstanding shares of each of the issuer’s classes of capital or common stock as of the close of the period covered by the annual report. As of March 31, 2018, 367,707,758 shares of common stock were outstanding, comprised of 362,637,512 Shares and 5,070,246 American Depositary Shares (equivalent to 5,070,246 Shares).
